overall.description: A static scenic overlook of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the contrast between high-tech skyscrapers and dense riverside slums. The camera slowly pans across a murky river with a red bridge on the left, revealing holographic advertisements and industrial smokestacks under clear morning sunlight.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the futuristic cityscape from an elevated riverside vantage point

entered.detail: large red-painted bridge spanning the river with multiple support pillars
dark brown water with gentle ripples reflecting the city lights
tall futuristic towers with glowing blue and orange holographic advertisements
tall chimneys emitting white smoke plumes into the clear sky
cluttered low-rise buildings with colorful awnings and makeshift construction
tall structures with bright pink and blue neon signage

segments.scene_description: A panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city from an elevated waterfront position. The scene captures a murky river in the foreground with a prominent red bridge on the left, while the background features a striking contrast between gleaming holographic skyscrapers and dense industrial slums. White smoke rises from distant smokestacks as the camera slowly pans across the cityscape, revealing neon advertisements and the sprawling urban architecture under bright morning sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow panoramic sweep across a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape, transitioning from a focused view of the waterfront to a wide expanse of urban contrast. It begins at an elevated position overlooking a murky river, where a prominent red bridge anchors the left side of the frame. As the camera pans across the horizon, the view shifts from the water toward a striking juxtaposition of gleaming holographic skyscrapers and dense industrial slums. The scene then expands to reveal neon advertisements and white smoke rising from distant smokestacks, all illuminated by the bright, clear light of morning sunlight.
